/usr/bin/ar qc libtdgl_core.a CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/mesh/edge_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/mesh/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/mesh/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/device/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/device/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/options/options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/operators/operators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/operators/poisson_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solver/psi_update.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solver/adaptive_step.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solver/observables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solver/solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solver/screening.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/solution/solution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdgl_core.dir/src/timing/timing.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtdgl_core.a
